tasks.dev: deno run -A npm:@tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/assets/index.css --watch & deno run -A npm:esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/assets/index.js --platform=browser --format=esm --watch & deno run --env-file --allow-net --allow-read --allow-run --allow-env --watch server.ts
tasks.build: deno run -A npm:@tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/assets/index.css -m && deno run -A npm:esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/assets/index.js --platform=browser --format=esm --minify && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp logo.jpg dist/logo.jpg
